channel.title: Mike Tattersall — Blog
channel.description: Writing on product management, service design, and delivery leadership from Mike Tattersall, Product Manager and Chief Delivery Officer at Hippo Digital.

item.title: My productivity system
item.description: A simple flowchart-based productivity system for managing incoming tasks — actionable or not, delegate or do, immediate or scheduled.

item.title: Service Design
item.description: What service design is, what service designers do, and how service blueprints fit alongside user research and analytics.

item.title: My product management principles
item.description: Seven principles that guide my approach to product management — from starting with why and designing for real people to measuring what matters.

item.title: Product management in government
item.description: Product management in government is shaped by users, policy, stakeholders and service context — not profit. The unique challenges and skills it demands.

item.title: Building effective teams to solve problems
item.description: Effective problem-solving teams start by understanding the problem, build around skills not job titles, and scale only when communication can hold up.
